problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
